proposed_relations.description: Future bus lanes on 34th Street discussed at Transitway CAC meeting

evidence_refs.source_quote: Consideration needs to be given to the snow removal process in the future bus lanes.
Clarify whether all buses operating on 34 th Street are allowed to use the bus lanes.

decisions.rationale: Direct evidence from CAC meeting minutes: discussion of snow removal in future bus lanes and clarifying which buses may use the lanes are part of the 34th Street Transitway concept planning.

proposed_relations.description: Signal prioritization for buses along 34th Street discussed at Transitway CAC meeting

evidence_refs.source_quote: The use of signal prioritization for buses along 34 th Street.

proposed_relations.description: Transitway configuration design concepts discussed at Transitway CAC meeting

evidence_refs.source_quote: Regarding the configuration of the Transitway: - Consider a center median along the entire corridor or along sections of 34 th Street where sidewalks are not at maximum capacity.

decisions.rationale: Direct evidence from CAC meeting minutes: Transitway configuration ideas including center median and elevated busway were discussed as design concepts for the 34th Street Transitway.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Regarding the configuration of the Transitway: - Consider a center median along the entire corridor or along sections of 34 th Street where sidewalks are not at maximum capacity.
